channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GAGAN] Gagan Gases: Promoter Roshan Lal Chabbra Passes Away
item.description:
Gagan Gases Ltd. has announced the death of Mr. Roshan Lal Chabbra, a member of the promoter group. Mr. Chabbra held NIL (0.00%) equity shares in the company. Consequently, he will cease to be part of the promoter/promoter group, in accordance with Regulation 31A(6)(c) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Mr. Roshan Lal Chabbra, a promoter group member of Gagan Gases Ltd., has passed away.
  • Mr. Chabbra held no equity shares (0.00%) in the company.
  • He will be removed from the promoter/promoter group as per SEBI regulations.
  • Gagan Gases Ltd. has informed the exchange about this event as per regulatory requirements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GAGAN GASES LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [3IINFOTECH] 3i Infotech Closes Netherlands Subsidiary; Board Approvals
item.description:
3i Infotech Ltd's board approved the closure of its step-down wholly-owned subsidiary, 3i Infotech Netherlands B.V., due to sustained losses and lack of business purpose. The board also approved audited financial results for FY26, a change in senior management, modifications to the Employee Stock Option Scheme 2023, and the incorporation of a subsidiary in Thailand. The auditor issued a modified opinion on the consolidated financial results.

  • 3i Infotech closes its Netherlands-based subsidiary due to dormancy and losses.
  • Anand Savla appointed as Senior Management Personnel, replacing Ramu Bodathula.
  • ESOP 2023 vesting schedule modified, pending shareholder approval.
  • Board approves incorporation of a wholly-owned subsidiary in Thailand.
  • Auditor issues a modified opinion on the consolidated financial results for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 3I INFOTECH LTD. | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [ITCHOTELS] ITC Hotels Board Meeting on 15 May 2026 to Consider Dividend
item.description:
ITC Hotels Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 15, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and twelve months ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 15, 2026.
  • Consideration of audited standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • Review of segment-wise revenue, results, assets, and liabilities.
  • Possible recommendation of a final dividend for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ITC Hotels Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [UNITINT] Unitech International CoC Meeting Outcome
item.description:
The 9th Meeting of the Committee of Creditors (CoC) of Unitech International Limited was held on May 5, 2026, via video conferencing. The CoC considered and deliberated on the agenda items. Key agenda items including the appointment of professional firms for due diligence and vetting of resolution plans, removal of the existing auditor, and appointment of a statutory auditor were deferred for the next meeting. The meeting also involved opening and considering resolution plans received from prospective resolution applicants, with sufficient time slots provided to each applicant.

  • Unitech International's 9th CoC meeting was conducted on May 5, 2026.
  • Appointment of professional firms for due diligence was deferred.
  • Removal of existing auditor ADV and Associates was deferred.
  • Appointment of a statutory auditor was deferred for the next meeting.
  • Resolution plans from prospective applicants were opened and considered.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNITECH INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MUTHTFN] Muthoot Capital Services Approves Audited FY26 Results
item.description:
Muthoot Capital Services Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, during its meeting held on May 08, 2026. The results, reviewed and recommended by the Audit Committee, come with an unmodified opinion from the Statutory Auditors, M/s. Sundaram & Srinivasan, Chartered Accountants. The meeting commenced at 2:00 p.m. and concluded at 09:00 p.m.

  • Audited standalone financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Auditors’ Report with unmodified opinion issued by Sundaram & Srinivasan.
  • Declaration of unmodified audit opinion as per Regulation 33(3)(d).
  • Certificate of Security Cover pursuant to Regulation 54(3) enclosed.
  • Meeting concluded at 09:00 p.m.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MUTHOOT CAPITAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PFOCUS] Prime Focus Ltd: NCLT admits insolvency petition
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Prime Focus Ltd has disclosed that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, admitted a petition under Section 7 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 against the company. The NCLT order appointed NPV Insolvency Professionals Private Limited as the Interim Resolution Professional (IRP). The amount of default is ₹353.79 crores, inclusive of interest on a principal amount of ₹200 crores. The National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT) directed that the IRP shall not take any further steps until the next hearing on May 11, 2026.

  • NCLT admits insolvency petition against Prime Focus Ltd.
  • NPV Insolvency Professionals appointed as Interim Resolution Professional (IRP).
  • Default amount is ₹353.79 crores, including interest.
  • NCLAT directs IRP to halt further steps until May 11, 2026 hearing.
  • Petition filed under Section 7 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRIME FOCUS LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [PRADPME] Pradeep Metals: Equity Shareholders Meeting on June 12, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Pradeep Metals Ltd has announced a meeting of equity shareholders on June 12, 2026, as directed by the National Company Law Tribunal, Mumbai Bench, regarding the Scheme of Amalgamation of Nami Capital Private Limited with Pradeep Metals Limited. The meeting will be held via video conferencing, with e-voting available from June 9-11, 2026. The notice and related documents are available on the company's website.

  • Equity shareholders meeting scheduled for June 12, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Meeting addresses the amalgamation of Nami Capital with Pradeep Metals.
  • E-voting will be available from June 9 to June 11, 2026.
  • Meeting convened under the directions of the NCLT, Mumbai Bench.
  • Notice and related documents are accessible on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRADEEP METALS LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [BAJAJHCARE] Bajaj Healthcare: Monitoring Agency Report for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Bajaj Healthcare Ltd. has released the Monitoring Agency Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI regulations. The report, issued by CARE Ratings Limited, pertains to the utilization of ₹204.97 crore raised through a preferential issue of equity shares and conversion of warrants. The report indicates no deviation from the stated objectives of the issue proceeds. The monitoring agency declares an objective view based on provided information, without performing an audit or independent verification.

  • CARE Ratings issued a monitoring report for Bajaj Healthcare's preferential issue.
  • The report covers the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • No deviations were noted in the utilization of the issue proceeds.
  • The issue size was ₹204.97 crore via equity and warrants.
  • The report is based on information provided by Bajaj Healthcare.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bajaj Healthcare Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [3IINFOTECH] 3i Infotech Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
3i Infotech Ltd's Board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The statutory auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the standalone results and a modified opinion on the consolidated results. The board also approved the appointment of Mr. Anand Savla as Senior Management Personnel, modifications to the Employee Stock Option Scheme 2023, incorporation of a step-down subsidiary in Thailand, and closure of a step-down subsidiary in the Netherlands.

  • Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, approved.
  • Appointment of Mr. Anand Savla as Senior Management Personnel approved.
  • Modifications to Employee Stock Option Scheme 2023 recommended, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Incorporation of a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary in Thailand approved.
  • Closure of 3i Infotech Netherlands B.V., a step-down subsidiary, approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 3I INFOTECH LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CENTUM] Centum Electronics Board Meeting on May 14, 2026
item.description:
Centum Electronics Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend, if any, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window remains closed until May 16, 2026. An earnings call with investors/analysts is scheduled for May 15, 2026, at 16:00 hours (IST).

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 14, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Dividend recommendation to be considered at the board meeting.
  • Trading window closed until May 16, 2026.
  • Earnings call scheduled for May 15, 2026, at 16:00 hours (IST).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTUM ELECTRONICS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
